typical_disruptions: Monsoon failure or delayed onset in Rajasthan
Oil and gas demand spikes (fracking grade guar)
Export duty changes by Indian government

nd_gain.note: High climate sensitivity; Rajasthan is semi-arid and monsoon-dependent

risk_context: India's Rajasthan state alone produces approximately 80% of the global guar supply. Production is entirely monsoon-dependent, making it extremely sensitive to climate variability. Guar gum is also critical for oil and gas fracking, creating cross-sector demand competition.
